name: PartyWoo Pastel Balloons 100pcs 12 Inch Pastel Rainbow Latex Balloons for Baby Shower Gender Reveal Engagement Bachelorette Easter Bridal Shower Anniversary Retirement Birthday Party Decorations
bullets: Package includes: 12 inch pastel balloons (100 pcs), in a solid consistent color that brings vibrant energy, can widely used in wedding decorations, birthday decorations, baby shower decorations and adding a vibrant touch to make your party bright.

Thick Durable Latex: These pastel balloons are made with high quality thick material, each balloon stays full longer perfect for arches garlands centerpieces. Ensuring your graduation, birthday stays perfect from setup to celebration end.

What To Fill With:These pastel balloons filled with AIR will stay full for up to 72 hours, while with HELIUM will stay full for 3-6 hours. For best float results, fill helium 1-2 hours before your event. Ensure your birthday party goes smoothly.

Attention & Warning: Please DO NOT overfill the pastel balloons and avoid sunburn, overheat, pointed object and excessive friction. Control the amount of air inflated into each balloon to achieve your ideal balloon size and widely used in party.

Perfect for Multiple Occasions: Whether it's a graduation party, baby shower decorations, engagement, anniversary, birthday, wedding party, bachelorette, retirement party. these pastel balloons are ideal and making your event more memorable.

reviews.name: Ashley Renea
reviews.title: Great durability and quality!
reviews.body: Balloons held for my event and even lasted days afterwards. The color stayed vibrant and the price was spot on. I will be ordering these in other colors for future events.

reviews.name: Yina
reviews.title: Just like kalisan
reviews.body: These are such great quality balloons, very comparable to kalisan maybe slightly thinner but just as good. They’re easy to twist together for arches or other sorts of balloon decor and they don’t pop on you. You can safely do outdoor setups with these, shine and all. Super easy to inflate, twist, install and they look amazing too. Definitely recommend, affordable, useful and just amazing overall!

reviews.name: Kindle Customer
reviews.title: Quality product
reviews.body: The red color is lighter after blown up than what it looks like in the deflated state. It's a lovely darker red. The balloons are sturdy.

reviews.name: Ulsmich
reviews.title: Gray with silver tone, great quality balloons!
reviews.body: Good quality silver balloons. They were not see through when blown up, nice solid gray with the silver tone. Happy with how the arrangement turned out with these!
